_instructions: Populate these fields with your credentials to activate each channel. JARVIS OPS will NOT send messages until a channel is marked enabled:true. Never commit real credentials — store them in Doppler and reference them here.

discord.note: Create a webhook in your Discord server settings → Integrations → Webhooks

slack.note: Create an incoming webhook at api.slack.com/apps

whatsapp.note: Requires Twilio WhatsApp Business API — approved for business use only

email.note: Use Doppler to inject SENDGRID_API_KEY at runtime
